---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for FedDocMCP
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this feature to work?

## Example Usage

Show how you would use this feature:

```
# Example tool call or interaction
"Show me all amendments to H.R. 1234"
```

## Alternative Solutions

Are there other ways this could be implemented?

## Congress.gov API

- [ ] Does this require a new Congress.gov API endpoint?
- [ ] If yes, which endpoint: [link to API docs]

## Implementation Notes

If you have technical suggestions for implementation:

- API endpoints needed:
- New tools required:
- Data structures:
- Potential challenges:

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing issues to make sure this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] This feature aligns with FedDocMCP's focus on Congressional data
- [ ] I'm willing to help implement this feature (optional)
